programme.title: S3E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The journey continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, a marine pioneer devoted to protecting the ocean’s most intelligent predator, the orca. She swims with wild orcas and leads the charge for innovative solutions to end captivity. Witness never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, paired with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at their most inspiring. In the wide-open skies and sweeping valleys of the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, more than 600 Wild American Mustangs roam free. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini reveals the importance of preserving this symbol of American heritage while passing its legacy to his children. As night falls, Tokyo becomes an electrifying playground for those who crave speed and style. The city’s custom vehicle culture bursts to life, introducing unforgettable characters and rides unlike anything you have seen before. Lamborghinis, Hayabusas, RWB Porsches, and Kaido Racers create a visual feast on the streets of Tokyo after dark.

programme.title: S3E3 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of four incredible adventures and discover how they came to life. At the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, over 600 Wild American Mustangs roam the sweeping valleys and open skies. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini shares the passion and dedication it takes to preserve this living symbol of American heritage. In Tokyo, the crew captures the city’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture thrives. From Lamborghinis to RWB Porsches, Hayabusas to Kaido Racers, every frame is a visual thrill. In the icy waters of Greenland’s Disko Bay, the team follows professional ice climbers Klemen Premrl and Aljaz Anderle as they take on a fragile and unpredictable iceberg, facing nature’s challenges and learning powerful lessons along the way. The journey closes with Dr. Ingrid Visser’s mission to protect the orca. Viewers are treated to never-before-seen footage from a GoPro mounted to a wild orca’s dorsal fin along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is an unmissable look at the grit, passion, and artistry behind creating these extraordinary stories.

programme.title: S3E4 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go further behind the scenes as the crew captures Tokyo’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture reigns supreme. They search for the elusive Shinichi Moroboshi, a legendary figure in Japan’s supercar scene and well-known Lamborghini enthusiast. The adventure continues in the snow with GoPro athletes John Jackson and Chris Benchetler on a quest for the perfect ride. From the bustling streets of Tokyo to the serene landscapes of Hakuba and the untouched powder fields of Hokkaido, the crew follows every moment of their journey. Along the way, you will see how these breathtaking stories were crafted, from scouting locations to capturing the raw energy and beauty of each scene. This is your all-access pass to the artistry, adrenaline, and dedication that make these adventures unforgettable.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank: Part Two
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Blue World Ep502: Muck Diving in Florida + Iceland…The World's Clearest Water
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird travels to Iceland to investigate a giant crack in the ground filled with frigid runoff from melting glaciers. It’s rumored to be the clearest water in the world. Next, he heads to sunny Florida, not to dive a coral reef or a spectacular shipwreck, but to dive in shallow, murky water under a busy bridge. This secret spot is home to some of the ocean’s most remarkable, and strange, creatures.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Still reeling from a mission briefing from the CIA, the contestants are thrown into a punishment for breaking protocol. It’s safe to say the contestants are having a sobering morning. However, the contestants are given a minor reprieve when Don assigns them to some stretch PT to give them a break before the ropes course gauntlet in the afternoon.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Day 4 of Season 3 kicks off with some much anticipated shooting.. or does it? This course of fire is actually using the latest cutting-edge CO2 technologies to train the contestants with another option for nonlethal force. Having a new weaponry option tucked in their arsenal, the competitors set out on their first recon mission for their CIA mission. Trudging through Alligator infested waters to their rendezvous point, the weight of the successful mission hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Aftermath hosts Chris and Cindy sit down with contestants Caleb and Jen to discuss one of the hardest days in Surviving Mann history. Caleb gives insight on his tug of war strategy.. which took inspiration from an unusual source. Next, Dr. Jeff West gives us the scoop about his life changing product. In the same vein, Eric from Nutrient Survival goes over what his company is doing for soldiers and civilians alike.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For physical training, Don does something unexpected when he hands over the reins to a contestant to lead. One would think that would make for an easy go of it, if it weren’t for the 3-time Olympian that was now in charge. Next, co-host Mike Glover leads Surviving Mann’s first ever After-Action report to debrief the previous night’s mission. Afterwards, the infamous Blah line makes its season debut to the contestants’ chagrin.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Matthew and James for a recap of Day 3, and let’s just say they’ll be staying away from crunches for the foreseeable future. Matthew also lets us in on his weakness that he’s hoping to work through in the upcoming days. From there, James goes into his background and the challenges he’s overcome to be able to rise up and test his limits.

Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S3E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The journey continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, a marine pioneer devoted to protecting the ocean’s most intelligent predator, the orca. She swims with wild orcas and leads the charge for innovative solutions to end captivity. Witness never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, paired with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at their most inspiring. In the wide-open skies and sweeping valleys of the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, more than 600 Wild American Mustangs roam free. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini reveals the importance of preserving this symbol of American heritage while passing its legacy to his children. As night falls, Tokyo becomes an electrifying playground for those who crave speed and style. The city’s custom vehicle culture bursts to life, introducing unforgettable characters and rides unlike anything you have seen before. Lamborghinis, Hayabusas, RWB Porsches, and Kaido Racers create a visual feast on the streets of Tokyo after dark.

programme.title: S3E3 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of four incredible adventures and discover how they came to life. At the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, over 600 Wild American Mustangs roam the sweeping valleys and open skies. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini shares the passion and dedication it takes to preserve this living symbol of American heritage. In Tokyo, the crew captures the city’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture thrives. From Lamborghinis to RWB Porsches, Hayabusas to Kaido Racers, every frame is a visual thrill. In the icy waters of Greenland’s Disko Bay, the team follows professional ice climbers Klemen Premrl and Aljaz Anderle as they take on a fragile and unpredictable iceberg, facing nature’s challenges and learning powerful lessons along the way. The journey closes with Dr. Ingrid Visser’s mission to protect the orca. Viewers are treated to never-before-seen footage from a GoPro mounted to a wild orca’s dorsal fin along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is an unmissable look at the grit, passion, and artistry behind creating these extraordinary stories.

programme.title: S3E4 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go further behind the scenes as the crew captures Tokyo’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture reigns supreme. They search for the elusive Shinichi Moroboshi, a legendary figure in Japan’s supercar scene and well-known Lamborghini enthusiast. The adventure continues in the snow with GoPro athletes John Jackson and Chris Benchetler on a quest for the perfect ride. From the bustling streets of Tokyo to the serene landscapes of Hakuba and the untouched powder fields of Hokkaido, the crew follows every moment of their journey. Along the way, you will see how these breathtaking stories were crafted, from scouting locations to capturing the raw energy and beauty of each scene. This is your all-access pass to the artistry, adrenaline, and dedication that make these adventures unforgettable.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: Road Trip Masters

programme.title: Road Trip Masters
programme.desc: This town is right on the banks of the Potomac River. Join Brian and Nick as they hit The Bavarian Inn, explore the town's history, make gourmet popcorn, and visit the battlefield that is known as The Bloodiest Day in American History.
